# Biomes

<!-- GENERATED by tools/gen-docs.js from the js/ source tables. Do not edit by hand. -->

Jittered-Voronoi regions assign terrain, liquids, temperature, and life.
Deeper runs bias toward the hazardous biomes. Each leads with a signature
enemy (see the [Bestiary](bestiary.md)).

| Biome | Depth | Temp | Terrain | Vein | Liquid | Traits | Signature enemy |
| --- | :---: | :---: | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Stone Caverns | 0–100% | 12° | Stone | Sand | Water | fauna, fungus | Grub |
| Overgrown Vault | 0–60% | 22° | Stone | Wood | Water | fauna, fungus | Pouncer |
| Ice Caves | 0–70% | -12° | Ice | Stone | Water | — | Frostling |
| Oil Caverns | 30–100% | 18° | Stone | Gunpowder | Oil | hazardous, fungus | Seeper |
| Volcanic Depths | 55–100% | 55° | Stone | Sand | Lava | hazardous | Magmite |
| Rusted Works | 45–100% | 28° | Metal | Sand | Water | hazardous, machinery, fungus | Voltbug |

_Depth is the fraction of the underground where a biome may appear (0% = just below the surface, 100% = map bottom). Temperature is the biome's ambient baseline in the heat field._
